programme.desc: See Mike’s smart framing strategy and deal with a steady stream of staff issues.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Seek shelter as endless rain and painful memories slow the team’s roofing job.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Visit the bustling job site, then get a lesson in local wetlands preservation.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Race the clock as tech and landscaping go in and crew issues boil over…again.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Celebrate the happy result of weeks of hard work as Gloria finally comes home.

programme.desc: Kick back as two retirees turn a shack into their very own piece of paradise.

programme.desc: Face chaos and a painful diagnosis as a couple renews a neglected water tower.

programme.desc: Deal with leaks, rot, and crumbling windows as a duo embraces church living.

programme.desc: Go full tilt as two reno rookies create an upside-down home for their family.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Gamble on a ramshackle family heirloom as two urbanites create a country oasis.

programme.desc: Revel in sumptuous comfort as the two original bedrooms become a guest haven.

programme.desc: Learn how to get big style on a small budget via an inspiring bathroom makeover.

programme.desc: Join Sarah as she updates the farmhouse kitchen layout, palette, and fixtures.
